en.extract:
The little minivet (Pericrocotus lansbergei), also known as the Flores minivet, is a species of bird in the family Campephagidae.  It is endemic to Indonesia.  Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest.

The '''little minivet''' ('''''Pericrocotus lansbergei'''''), also known as the '''Flores minivet''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Campephagidae]].  It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Indonesia]].  Its natural [[habitat]] is [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]].

zh.extract:
三色山椒鸟（学名：Pericrocotus lansbergei）是山椒鸟科山椒鸟属的一种，为印度尼西亚的特有种。其自然栖息地为亚热带或热带的湿润低地森林。


参考文献
BirdLife International. Pericrocotus lansbergei. The IUCN Red List of Threatened Species 2009.   [2010-10-31] （英语）.
